useWhen: BaseScan asks for more token profile context
Blockaid, MetaMask, Uniswap, or a wallet-security reviewer asks for more evidence
a data platform asks which links are official
a community moderator asks how to explain current review status
a listing platform asks whether the project is ready for tracked listing
doNotUseWhen: a platform has not asked for more information and a duplicate request would be spam
the reply would claim warning removal before visible confirmation
the reply would claim BaseScan profile approval before publication
the reply would claim external audit completion before an independent report is published
the reply would imply mature liquidity, price support, or return promises

walletWarningReviewer.subject: GCA Base Mainnet wallet warning review evidence
body: Please review GCA on Base Mainnet as a possible false-positive wallet or DEX-interface warning.
Current official pool: Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT, 0xfe6a598bf738d7eec9640897064ca3a490128d3d447ced96077aef8e9dd1c1d0

The contract is fixed supply, source verified on BaseScan, and has no post-deployment mint function, owner/admin role, proxy, blacklist, pause function, transfer tax, hidden fee, custody path, or withdrawal path.
A Blockaid false-positive report was submitted on 2026-05-10 and a follow-up was submitted on 2026-05-13. Warning removal is not confirmed.

baseScanProfile.subject: GCA token profile follow-up for Base Mainnet
body: Thank you for reviewing the GCA token profile submission.
Please let us know if any field correction or additional verification is required.

metadataCorrection.subject: GCA official metadata and market links
body: Please use the following official GCA metadata for Base Mainnet.
Official pool: Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT on Base Mainnet, 0xfe6a598bf738d7eec9640897064ca3a490128d3d447ced96077aef8e9dd1c1d0

communityModerator.subject: Official GCA verification links
body: GCA is early-stage. Wallet-warning removal, BaseScan token profile publication, tracked listings, deep liquidity, and third-party audit completion are not confirmed unless the relevant public page says so.

trackedListingNotReady.subject: GCA listing readiness status
body: GCA tracked listing submission is prepared but currently deferred.
Current blockers include starter-depth liquidity, limited public activity, pending BaseScan token profile publication, wallet-warning review not confirmed removed, and no completed third-party audit.
We do not want to overstate readiness or submit misleading market claims.

safePublicClaims: GCA is deployed on Base Mainnet with fixed total supply.
BaseScan source and deployer-wallet ownership verification are complete.
GeckoTerminal token information was approved on 2026-05-11.
The official public market route is the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
A Blockaid false-positive report and follow-up were submitted, but warning removal is not confirmed.
No third-party audit has been completed.
doNotClaim: Blockaid or MetaMask warning removal before visible confirmation
BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it
CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap listing before publication
external audit completion before an independent report is published
locked reserve before on-chain custody changes
deep liquidity, price support, or return promises
